title: Ludwig van Beethoven
extract: Ludwig van Beethoven was a German composer, conductor, and pianist. Mentored during the Classical period, Beethoven's musical style was a key driver of the transition to Romantic music, and the expansion of popular forms such as the symphony and string quartet. His compositions have attracted casual and scholarly interest, and remain among the most performed in the world.
extract_html: Ludwig van Beethoven was a German composer, conductor, and pianist. His compositions have attracted casual and scholarly interest, and remain among the most performed in the world.
